nilai.guideDescription: Enter final report card grades per subject per period. These grades are the accumulation of all assessment components (daily tests, assignments, midterms, finals). Select Class → Period → Subject to begin.
nilai.tip1: Merdeka Curriculum: fill in the Final Grade + Competency Achievement Description.
nilai.tip2: K13: fill in Knowledge and Skill grades separately.
nilai.tip3: Click a student's name to view their full profile.
nilai.tip4: To enter daily test/assignment/midterm/final grades, use the Grade Entry page.
nilai.title: Grades / Report Cards
nilai.emptyFilter: Select a class, period, and subject to begin entering grades.
nilai.emptyRombel: This class has no members yet.
nilai.saveHint: {n, plural, one {# student} other {# students}} · grades are saved and updated automatically
nilai.entriDescription: Enter raw grades: daily tests, assignments, midterms, finals — the basis for report card calculation.
nilai.entriEmptyFilter: Select a class, period, subject, and grade type.
nilai.raporDescription: Complete page 2 of the report card (e-Rapor Merdeka) per student.
